#[derive(Debug, thiserror::Error)]
pub enum ProtocolError {
    #[error("header too short: expected 8 bytes, got {actual}")]
    HeaderTooShort { actual: usize },
    #[error("unsupported protocol version: {0}")]
    UnsupportedVersion(u8),
    #[error("empty frame payload")]
    EmptyFrame,
    #[error("unknown frame kind: {0}")]
    UnknownFrameKind(u8),
}

pub fn parse_header(data: &[u8]) -> Result<Header, ProtocolError> {
    if data.len() < 8 {
        return Err(ProtocolError::HeaderTooShort { actual: data.len() });
    }
    let version = data[0];
    if version != 1 && version != 2 {
        return Err(ProtocolError::UnsupportedVersion(version));
    }
    let length = u32::from_be_bytes([data[4], data[5], data[6], data[7]]);
    Ok(Header { version, length })
}

pub fn decode_frame(payload: &[u8]) -> Result<Frame<'_>, ProtocolError> {
    if payload.is_empty() {
        return Err(ProtocolError::EmptyFrame);
    }
    let kind = payload[0];
    if kind > 5 {
        return Err(ProtocolError::UnknownFrameKind(kind));
    }
    Ok(Frame {
        kind,
        data: &payload[1..],
    })
}

struct Header {
    version: u8,
    length: u32,
}

struct Frame<'a> {
    kind: u8,
    data: &'a [u8],
}
